'''81-X'''<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=Revenge of the Sith|cardname=Commerce Guild Droid 81-X}}</ref> was a [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]]<ref name="Episode II">{{Film|II}}</ref> of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].<ref name="TCG" /> It participated in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]<ref name="Episode II" />

{{Droid-stub}}
